# ChordsFinder

> Detect chords, key, and chord progression from any song — 100% in your browser.

## Overview

ChordsFinder is a static web app that detects **chords** and **musical key** from audio files, YouTube links, microphone input, or browser tab audio capture. Everything runs client-side via essentia.js WASM — no servers, no uploads, 100% private.

## Features

- **File Upload**: Drop MP3, WAV, FLAC, or OGG files — auto-analyzes on drop
- **YouTube URL**: Paste a YouTube link — audio is fetched via public Piped API
- **Tab Capture**: Record audio from any browser tab (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- **Microphone**: Record 10 seconds from your mic
- **Results**: Detected key (e.g., C major, A minor), current chord, chord progression, confidence scores

## Usage

### For users
Open https://fecolinhares.github.io/ChordsFinder/ in any modern browser.

### For AI agents
This site exposes WebMCP Declarative API tools:
- `uploadFile` — Upload audio file for chord detection
- `analyzeYoutube` — Analyze chords from a YouTube URL
- `captureAudio` — Capture live audio for chord detection

## Tech Stack

- **Audio processing**: essentia.js WASM (TonalExtractor + KeyExtractor)
- **YouTube**: Piped API (public, no key)
- **Capture**: Web Audio API, getUserMedia, getDisplayMedia
- **Styling**: Rhythmcore design system (Inter, JetBrains Mono, OKLCH tokens)
- **Offline**: Service Worker

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/fecolinhares/ChordsFinder
- Live: https://fecolinhares.github.io/ChordsFinder/
